message:
feat(fcp-core): implement FCP2 Revocation types and registry (1n78.9)

Implement revocation system from FCP_Specification_V2.md §14.3:

- RevocationScope: Capability, IssuerKey, NodeAttestation, ZoneKey, ConnectorBinary
- RevocationObject: Owner-signed object revoking ObjectIds with effective_at/expires_at
- RevocationEvent: Hash-chain node with monotonic sequence for O(1) freshness
- RevocationHead: Quorum-signed checkpoint for freshness comparison
- EpochId: Temporal ordering for revocation checkpoints
- BloomFilter: Fast negative lookups with BLAKE3 hashing
- RevocationRegistry: HashMap + bloom filter for efficient revocation checks
- FreshnessPolicy: Strict/Warn/BestEffort for different risk tiers

Fixed 24 clippy warnings (doc backticks, const fn, div_ceil, etc).
All 293 fcp-core tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
